🔍 SQL MURDER MYSTERY

A murder happened on January 15, 2024. Find the killer using SQL queries.

📋 Case Details

Crime: Murder victim found in the city
Date: January 15, 2024
Location: Warehouse District
Weapon: Unknown
Available Tables:
• crimes (id, date, description, city)
• person (id, name, ssn, age, height, hair_color, eye_color)
• interview (person_id, transcript)
• drivers_license (person_id, plate_number, car_make)
• gym_checkin (person_id, check_in_date)
• bank_account (person_id, account_number, balance)
🔎 First Clue:
Someone reported seeing a car with a red plate number at the warehouse.
💡 Start by finding the crime report, then search for witnesses, then find suspects with red plates.

⌨️ Query Console

Solved: 0/3 Objectives


Ready for input...
